name: suspicious_powershell.yar
content:
rule suspicious_powershell {
    meta:
        description = "Detects suspicious PowerShell execution"
        author = "SOC Team"
    strings:
        $cmd = "powershell.exe" nocase
        $enc = "-encodedcommand" nocase
    condition:
        $cmd and $enc
}

name: win_susp_powershell.yml
content:
title: Suspicious PowerShell Encoded Command
id: 762c2f7b-bb66-417f-ad66-f0803554471f
status: experimental
description: Detects suspicious base64 encoded command execution.
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 4688
        CommandLine|contains: '-encodedcommand'
    condition: selection
level: high

name: misp_wazuh_rules.xml
content:
<group name="syslog,errors,">
  <rule id="100201" level="5">
    <decoded_as>syslog</decoded_as>
    <description>MISP-sourced alert: test rule</description>
  </rule>
</group>
